title: Backend Developer Vacancy at PhonePe - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at PhonePe - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? PhonePe in Meerut offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About PhonePe:
PhonePe is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PhonePe!
